pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly require these file names for evaluation.
Task description requests saving to '~/Documents/hec_ras_results/'. export_result.sh reads files from this exact path.
setup_task.sh copies Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf to Muncie.p04.hdf, and export_result.sh uses this file for ground truth generation.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires analyzing the HEC-RAS simulation output file 'Muncie.p04.hdf', which is an official example model of the White River at Muncie, IN. The data represents synthetic Water Surface Elevation (WSE) time series generated by the hydraulic simulation. Code execution verified that the dataset contains 61 cross-sections. The 2nd and 3rd most upstream cross-sections are located at river stations 15485.51 and 15370.43 respectively. The target virtual station is exactly at their midpoint, 15427.97. The expected files ('virtual_gauge_analysis.py', 'virtual_gauge_info.txt', 'virtual_gauge_wse.csv') and the output directory ('/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results') correctly match the task evaluation scripts.
